description: Happy-path lifecycle — issue moves through five columns and closes with the commit reference
query: Implement user login. The project has GITHUB_PROJECTS_URL configured.
expected_behavior: creates a GitHub issue with the spec-card.md content embedded at the spec phase
moves the same issue through In Progress, Review, Testing on each pipeline transition
closes the issue with the commit hash in the closing comment after commit
uses gh-sync (not raw gh issue create) so the issue number tracks across phases
